2022 NBA Playoffs Summary

2021 Playoffs Summary 2023 Playoffs Summary

League Champion: Golden State Warriors

Finals MVP: Stephen Curry (31.2 / 6.0 / 5.0)


2022 Playoff Leaders:

PTS: Jayson Tatum (615)

TRB: Al Horford (214)

AST: Jayson Tatum (148)

WS: Jimmy Butler (3.8)

Finals Golden State Warriors over Boston Celtics  (4-2) Series Stats
